falsification_criteria: Archive if external-data/PIT gate cannot be satisfied.
Archive if validation net turns negative under the true data source.
Archive if one sleeve contributes more than 40% of positive contribution under true data.
Archive if ex-best-sleeve net return is non-positive under true data.
Archive if benchmark-relative return is not positive after costs.
hypothesis: A fixed-weight basket combining reversion, continuation, and dollar-sampled microstructure may be more robust than a single setup, but only if it survives a survivorship-free/PIT data gate.

sleeves.name: Mean-reversion sleeve
sleeves.rule: Buy diversified dislocations after confirmation; do not average down into unresolved continuation.

sleeves.name: Momentum sleeve
sleeves.rule: Hold diversified continuation candidates only through the frozen multi-day horizon.

sleeves.name: Dollar-bar microstructure sleeve
sleeves.rule: Use traded-dollar sampling as a stabilizer, not as standalone promotion evidence.

weight_policy.reason: Weights are semantic and frozen; they are not fitted to historical Sharpe or net return.
